article_meta.title: A copy of the Ten Commandments is posted along with other historical documents in a hallway of the Georgia Capitol on June 20, 2024, in Atlanta

reasoning: Plausible Lean Left classification (article reads Center to subtle Lean Left) with solid, author-prose-based evidence and no attribution violations. Confidence slightly high for a subtle tilt, and the model wrapped its JSON in code fences (minor format failure).
